name: ROOM FOOTBALL - Hangar
short_description: Puzzle, artillery, casual puzzle video game with realistic physics.
detailed_description:
Puzzle, artillery, casual puzzle video game with realistic physics.

On the map there are objects marked with a red beam going into the sky, the player must find all these objects and destroy them with a soccer ball to complete the game.

Objects that need to be found and destroyed are marked with a red beam going into the sky.

The player needs to control the camera on the WASD buttons and the mouse, find all the necessary objects on the location and hold down the left mouse button, controlling the force of the blow to the ball, knock them down as quickly as possible, getting points for it.

The game has achievements and leaderboards.
